LOGAN: Get your fat ass back in your office. You'll get you

evidence_snippets: He turns to face A DISHEVELED HISPANIC WOMAN, 35. She stands about twenty paces from THE BATTERED FIAT WITH ONE HEADLIGHT,
HISPANIC WOMAN ...I knew it was you.
HISPANIC WOMAN (CONT'D) Please. I'm in trouble. You're the
HISPANIC WOMAN (CONT'D) I need a hero.
He turns to his clients, holding the umbrella over a sobbing widow, escorting her to the door of his limo. The Hispanic woman just stands there, rain soaking her.
